description: Discover the breathtaking beauty of Sri Lanka, an island where golden beaches meet lush green mountains. Explore ancient temples, tea gardens, wildlife safaris, and charming coastal towns. From the cultural wonders of Kandy and Sigiriya to the scenic train rides of Nuwara Eliya and the serene shores of Bentota, Sri Lanka offers a perfect blend of nature, history, adventure, and relaxation — ideal for families, couples, and groups.
cost_includes:
Return Economy Airfare BOM-BOM 
Meet & assistance at the airport.
Bentota :1N
Nuwara Eliya :1N
Colombo :1N
Kandy :2N
Meals on half board basis.
Breakfast & Dinner
Transportation in an air-conditioned car with the service of an English speaking chauffeur.
All applicable taxes & service charge.
cost_excludes:
Any meals other than those mentioned above included.
GST 5%
Air Ticket
Meal Other than mention in inclusion.
Any Personal expenses.
Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all term of personal nature.
Vehicle for Shopping, any personal things.
Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions.
Expenses caused by factors beyond our control like rail and flight delays, roadblocks, political disturbances etc.

faqs.title: 1. What is the best time to visit Sri Lanka?
faqs.content:
Sri Lanka is a year-round destination, but the best time depends on the region:

  • South & West Coast + Hill Country: December to March
  • East Coast: April to September

faqs.title: 2. Do I need a visa to visit Sri Lanka?
faqs.content: Yes. Most travelers need to apply for an ETA (Electronic Travel Authorization) online before arrival.

faqs.title: 3. What are the must-visit places in Sri Lanka?
faqs.content:
• Kandy – Temple of the Tooth
  • Nuwara Eliya – tea gardens & cool climate
  • Bentota – beaches & water sports
  • Colombo – city life & shopping
  • Sigiriya Rock, Ella, Yala National Park, Galle Fort

faqs.title: 4. Is Sri Lanka safe for tourists?
faqs.content: Yes, Sri Lanka is considered safe and tourist-friendly. Always follow local guidelines and stay aware of road conditions in hilly areas.

faqs.title: 5. What is the local currency?
faqs.content: The currency is the Sri Lankan Rupee (LKR).
